_meta.purpose: Placebo channels (spec layer 4d): topics with no plausible India-geopolitics link. They should NOT spike around geopolitical episodes. If they do, the pipeline is measuring general news volume, not channel salience. Run: python -m src.validate placebo. Caveat, disclosed in methodology s8: sport is not perfectly insulated (India-Pakistan cricket is itself geopolitics-adjacent), so cricket terms avoid Pakistan-linked fixtures.
_meta.note: Excluded from the index and composite entirely; fetched only by the validation harness.
